tests.name: test_final_state.py::test_trace_contains_observations
tests.trace:
@pytest.fixture(scope="module")
    def trace_payload():
        trace_id = _read_trace_id_from_log()
>       return _fetch_trace(trace_id)

tests/test_final_state.py:81: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

trace_id = 'eee60f97c782214f5293bd1539b6af20'

    def _fetch_trace(trace_id):
        url = f"{_base_url()}/api/public/traces/{trace_id}"
        auth = _basic_auth()
        deadline = time.time() + 90  # allow ~90s for async ingestion
        last_status = None
        last_body = None
        while time.time() < deadline:
            resp = requests.get(url, auth=auth, timeout=15)
            last_status = resp.status_code
            last_body = resp.text
            if resp.status_code == 200:
                return resp.json()
            if resp.status_code in (401, 403):
                pytest.fail(
                    f"Authentication to Langfuse Public API failed (status {resp.status_code}). "
                    f"Check LANGFUSE_PUBLIC_KEY / LANGFUSE_SECRET_KEY. Body: {resp.text}"
                )
            time.sleep(3)
>       pytest.fail(
            f"Trace {trace_id} was not retrievable from {url} within timeout. "
            f"Last status: {last_status}, last body: {last_body!r}"
        )
E       Failed: Trace eee60f97c782214f5293bd1539b6af20 was not retrievable from https://us.cloud.langfuse.com/api/public/traces/eee60f97c782214f5293bd1539b6af20 within timeout. Last status: 404, last body: '{"message":"Trace eee60f97c782214f5293bd1539b6af20 not found within authorized project","error":"LangfuseNotFoundError"}'

tests/test_final_state.py:72: Failed
